findings.description: The source h2 section '使用例' contains two h3 subsections ('1行に複数のUI部品を並べる場合' and '列によって異なる行数を定義する場合'), each with substantial JSP code examples. Total plain-text length of the h2 section far exceeds 2000 characters. Per V3 rules, when h2 >= 2000 chars AND h3 subsections exist but the knowledge file does not split them, this should be reported. All three source headings are merged into a single section s1.
findings.source_evidence: Source h2: '使用例' (dashes underline). Source h3 subsections: '1行に複数のUI部品を並べる場合' (===) and '列によって異なる行数を定義する場合' (===), each with multi-point implementation notes and 30+ line JSP code blocks.

findings.description: @contentGridSpan is explicitly referenced in the source as the defining property for the business content area grid count ('業務コンテンツ部のグリッド数は、@contentGridSpan で定義された値'), making it a key configuration property name. It appears in the knowledge file body but is absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source: '業務コンテンツ部のグリッド数は、`レイアウトの調整方法`の*@contentGridSpan*で定義された値'
